cfg_statements.code: import sys, bisect, math, itertools, heapq, collections

for i in range(q): mode, first, second = input().split() if mode == "1": st.update(int(first)-1,1<<(int.from_bytes(second.encode(),'little')-int.from_bytes('a'.encode(),'little'))) else: ans.append(bin(st.query(int(first) - 1, int(second))).count("1"))

while k > 0: k = (k - 1) // 2 self.data[k] = self._segfunc(self.data[2*k+1], self.data[2*k+2])

if R & 1: R -= 1 s = self._segfunc(s, self.data[R-1])
